prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第31名（2025年第29名），近年稳定在前32，属于中坚985梯队；2026年声誉文件中湖南大 学未出现明显负面事件；抖音热度排名第16（高热），短视频曝光量较高，反映报考关注度升温；化学A、机械工程A、工商管理A、土木工程A-、计算机科学与 技术A-、电气工程A-、控制科学与工程A-、应用经济学A-，共8个A-/A/A级学科，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为高 热推荐专业，与该校物理类招生专业高度匹配，推高报考热度；本省2026年物理类考生约25.1万人（按历史比例估算），较2025年24.98万人略有增加；湖南大学位于邻省湖南，对湖北考生有天然地域吸引力，跨省报考热度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准8567名、2026年缩招约10.2%（位次前移 ）、抖音高热及热门工科专业推高竞争、考生总数微增等因素，再考虑热门专业持续升温及抖音高热带来的竞争加剧，小幅上调；预测最低位次约8091 名，区间7591–8591名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7559 → 7842 → 7357 → 8760 → 8567, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend. In 2024, it significantly dropped to 8760, then slightly recovered to 8567 in 2025, with a cumulative decline of about 1200 positions over the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 8567. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 184 → 188 → 185 → 187 → 205 students, expanding to 205 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 184 students, a reduction of about 10.2% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 31st in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (29th in 2025), stable within the top 32 in recent years, belonging to the core 985 tier. In the 2026 reputation document, Hunan University had no significant negative incidents. Douyin popularity ranking 16th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications. Disciplines: Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Civil Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Applied Economics A-, totaling 8 A-/A/A-level disciplines, with outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended popular majors, closely matching the university's Physics Category enrollment majors, boosting application heat. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is approximately 251,000 (estimated by historical proportion), slightly increasing from 249,800 in 2025. Hunan University is located in neighboring Hunan Province, naturally attracting Hubei examinees, with high cross-province application heat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline of 8567, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 10.2% (ranking moving forward), Douyin high heat and popular engineering majors increasing competition, and a slight increase in total examinees, along with the continued heating of popular majors and increased competition from Douyin high heat, a slight upward adjustment is made. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8091, with a range of 7591–8591.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7591–8591, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (≤7591), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Automation. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (≥8591), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety and cautiously aim for Tier 1.
